zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide di Savoia於1050年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 姆尼澤-藍德迪倫努爾多福史瓦本時，她的父親Count Oddone di Savoia30歲，母親Adelaide di Susa36歲。她於大約1062年與Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1079年6月4日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇利艾享年29歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide di Savoia于1050年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 姆尼澤-藍德迪倫努爾多福史瓦本时，她的父亲Count Oddone di Savoia30岁，母亲Adelaide di Susa36岁。她于大约1062年与Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1079年6月4日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇利艾享年29岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Savoia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

variants.name: Savoie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide di Savoia was born in 1050, in Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Saxony, Germany, her father, Count Oddone di Savoia, was 30 and her mother, Adelaide di Susa, was 36. She married Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben about 1062. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 4 June 1079, in Liège, Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 29, and was buried in Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide di Savoia est née en 1050, à Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Count Oddone di Savoia, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adelaide di Susa, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben environ 1062. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juin 1079, à Liège, Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Empire romain.

de.Schwaben, Chemnitzer, Sachsen, Germany: Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide di Savoia 1050 in Schwaben, Dürrenuhlsdorf, Kreis Chemnitzer-Land, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Count Oddone di Savoia 30 und ihre Mutter Adelaide di Susa 36. Sie hat um 1062 Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juni 1079 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Lüttich, Heiliges Römisches Reich und wurde in Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

ko.Schwaben, Chemnitzer, Sachsen, Germany: 독일 작센 크레이스 체니츠-랜드 드u렌울즈도르프 슈와벤
ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide di Savoia(이)가 1050년 독일 작센 크레이스 체니츠-랜드 드u렌울즈도르프 슈와벤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Count Oddone di Savoia(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide di Susa(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1062년 Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1079년 6월 4일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 리e지에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide di Savoia родилась в 1050 г. в местности щвабен, дuрренухлсдорф, крис чемницир-ланд, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Count Oddone di Savoia было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide di Susa, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben около 1062 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 июня 1079 г. в местности лиeдж, хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

Se casó con Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben aproximadamente 1062. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas.
